name: Turtles Cheesecake!
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pecans, sugar, and butter; mix well.
2. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring form pan.
3. Bake in a 325°F oven for 12 minutes; set aside.
4. Beat cream cheese until smooth.
5. Beat in brown sugar, flour, and vanilla until well blended.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Stir in chopped turtles.
8. Pour mixture over pecan crust.
9. Bake in a 325°F oven for 50-60 minutes, or until the center of the cake is just set.
10. Turn off the oven and let the cake stand in the oven for 30 minutes.
11. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack; cool to room temperature.
12. Chill for at least 4 hours before serving.
Makes 8-10 servings.
